data.name: Hentai Tales: Succubus Utopia
data.detailed_description:
遊戲玩法

在完成謎題的同時享受故事的樂趣。
根據方塊上的數字連接線，直到完成所有空格。
完成謎題後，你會得到一本主角的經歷日記。
收集所有日記來體驗完整的故事。

故事背景

傳說世界上存在著像魅魔這樣的生物。她們會在深夜潛入熟睡的男人的夢中，與夢中的男人發生性關係，以獲取自己所需的營養。
你即將與這些魅魔建立一段難忘的關係。
這裡會發生什麼事？

人物

Hamiri：

Hamiri 是一位治癒系魅魔，即將在仙境中與你進行一次難忘的性交。

Koni：

Koni個性調皮，喜歡折磨無法抗拒她的人類，但這次情況可能有所不同。

Lisami:

Lisami是性慾極強的魅魔。她經常與世界上不同的男人發生性關係。似乎沒有一個男人能讓她滿意，而她還在尋找一個能讓她滿意的男人。

特徵

  • 以個性獨特的女主角為主角的想像奇幻色情故事。
  • 20張女主角的性感色情CG。
  • 隨時跳過謎題。 （在拼圖處按 Enter 鍵）。
  • CG欣賞模式。 （完成拼圖後點選旁邊的CG）

*具備完整音效支援的語言

最低配備:

  • 處理器: 4GHz+
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512MB
  • 儲存空間: 800 MB 可用空間

data.name: Hentai Tales: Succubus Utopia
data.detailed_description:
GamePlay

Enjoy a sensual story while completing tricky puzzles!
Connect the numbers sequentially, using all of the squares on the board
After completing a puzzle, you will unlock a sexy new image and the next part of the story!
Can you complete every puzzle and meet all of the succubi?!

Story Background

Legend has it that succubi exist somewhere beyond the realm of sleep.
They sneak into the dreams of young men after midnight and have their way with them to obtain their erotic energy.
You are about to have an unforgettable series of encounters with these succubi! What fate will befall you?

Characters

Hamiri:

Hamiri is a healing succubus who welcomes you to an unforgettable series of sexual encounters.

Koni:

Koni has a mischievous personality and likes to torture humans who can't resist her. She especially enjoys immobilising human men using her paralysis hexes.

Lisami:

Lisami cute appearance hides her strong sexual desires. She often has sex with different human men around the world. But no man seems to be able to satisfy her...

Features

  • 20 sexy and erotic images of beautiful succubi.
  • A fantastical erotic story with succubi who have unique personalities.
  • You can skip the puzzles if you just want to enjoy the story. (Press Enter during a puzzle).
  • CG Gallery mode. (Click the left and right buttons next to the CG after completing a puzzle).
